content.summary: Stores tabular data (rows/columns). Lookup tables, parameter lists, CSV.

examples.label: Populate a lookup table
examples.code:
t = op('table1')
t.clear()
t.appendRow(['name', 'value'])
t.appendRow(['speed', '1.5'])
t.appendRow(['scale', '0.8'])

examples.label: Read a cell value
examples.description: Look up a value by row name and column header.

examples.label: Load table from CSV file
examples.description: Set the file path and trigger a reload.
